column1: Travel Gallery: Photo zooms in when the expand option is clicked
column27:
*Preconditions:*

Users must log in to the application using their login credentials.

*Steps:*
 # Open the application URL: [https://photostudio.demohoster.com/]
 # Fill up the "Username" and "Password" field
 # Click the "Sign in" button
 # Hover the cursor over "CONNECT"
 # Select "TRAVEL" 
 # Click a photo with expand option

 

*Actual Result:* Photo zooms in when the expand option is clicked. Please see [^Bug_50.mp4]

*Expected Result:* Photo should not zoom in when the expand option is clicked because of natural size in multiple photos according to the requirements. Please see [^50.png]


*Additional Information:* This issue is reproduced in all gallery's expand option.
column28:
*OS:* Windows 11 Enterprise, 64-bit

*Browser:* Google Chrome Version 145.0.7632.45 (Official Build) (64-bit)

column1: Book Session: Session Information: "Standard Session" image is displayed instead of "Mini Outdoor Session" image

column141:
01/Mar/26 2:49 AM;m.mahmud;h2. Portrait Gallery: No tooltip has been added to the preview photos
h3. Details
 * 
*Type:*!https://jira.a1qa.com/secure/viewavatar?size=xsmall&avatarId=25963&avatarType=issuetype|width=16,height=16!  Bug
 * 
*Resolution:* Unresolved
 * 
*Priority:*!https://jira.a1qa.com/images/icons/priorities/major.svg|width=16,height=16!  Major
 * 
*Fix Version/s:* None
 * 
{*}Affects Version/s:{*}1.0
 * 
{*}Component/s:{*}[GregOlsen.PhotoStudio|https://jira.a1qa.com/issues/?jql=project+%3D+QATC+AND+component+%3D+GregOlsen.PhotoStudio]
 * 
*Environment:*
*OS:* Windows 11 Enterprise, 64-bit

*Browser:* Google Chrome Version 145.0.7632.45 (Official Build) (64-bit)

 * 
*Severity/Importance:*
3-Average
 * 
*Error Type:*
Functional
h3. Description
 

*Preconditions:*

Users must log in to the application using their login credentials.

*Steps:*
 # Open the application URL: [https://photostudio.demohoster.com/]
 # Fill up the "Username" and "Password" field
 # Click the "Sign in" button
 # Hover cursor to "WORK"
 # Click "PORTRAIT"
 # Observe the preview photos

 

*Actual Result:* No tooltip has been added to the preview photos. Please see [^Bug_6.png]

*Expected Result:* All preview photos should have tooltip with photo number according to the requirements. Please see [^6.png]

*Additional Information:* This issue is reproduced in all submenus of "WORK".;;;
